title: pentameris nutans
intro: Pentameris nutans, also known as the nodding grass or nodding wood grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Japan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pentameris nutans are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Pentameris nutans typically involve infusing the plant in hot water or making a tincture, and it is often used in traditional Japanese medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
